no: Rough World BETA 1.41 by yellow hat elminster. Abandoned BG1/BGEE difficulty mod. Adds harder spawns, rest restrictions, Chapter 7 content, beggar encounters, reputation overhaul, and LoB/save restrictions. cn:0 and cn:1 are BGEE-only (FAIL on BG2/IWD). cn:6 uses COPY_EXISTING_REGEXP on ALL .cre files — very heavy patch. cn:7 modifies ALL .are files. Pre-EET install per compatibility table. Polish translation available.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

conflicts.reason: Both modify reputation tables (rmodrep.2da, repstart.2da, reputati.2da).
Only Autosaves disables manual/quicksave by clearing the save flag on all .are files. Conflicts with cdtweaks interval save components.

sum: Rough World increases the overall difficulty of Baldur's Gate by making enemies tougher and encounters more challenging throughout the game.

co.no: BGEE only — FAILs on BG2/IWD. Adds level-scaled enemy spawns to 20+ BG1 wilderness and dungeon areas (Nashkel Mines, Cloakwood, Bandit Camp, etc.). Includes new creatures: Iron Throne soldiers, priest, Cold Steel Orcs, small spiders with custom animations. Also adds dialogue extensions (Aolan, Drasus).

BGEE only — FAILs on BG2/IWD. Restricts resting in certain areas. Adds conditional rest messages based on quest progress (e.g., Seniyad's grove safe after clearing, Aldeth's area accessible). Extends 4 area scripts with rest-blocking conditions.

Major Chapter 7 overhaul. Makes Baldur's Gate city hostile — wanted posters, Flaming Fist encounters across 9 city districts. Adds a smuggler NPC, creates AR0800 bridge trigger region, and populates areas with ~30 new Flaming Fist creatures with custom scripts. Sets up a fugitive atmosphere.
Replaces standard beggar .cre files with 11 new variants. Adds fly swarm VVC/EFF effects. Includes new beggar dialogue. Cosmetic/atmospheric enhancement.
Replaces reputation level names in reptxt.2da with grittier labels: Sadist, Thug, Ruffian, Meddler, Adventurer, Hero, Savior.

Overwrites 4 reputation tables (rmodrep, repstart, reputati, repmodst + SoD variant). Well-liked characters can kill one innocent without catastrophic rep loss. Starting reputation narrowed to 9-11 range. Church donation costs rebalanced for evil characters.

co.n: Legacy of Bhaal forced Insane difficulty
co.tp2n: Install Legacy of Bhaal is forced Insane difficulty
co.no: WARNING: Patches EVERY .cre file in override via COPY_EXISTING_REGEXP GLOB. Sets BIT22 (Legacy of Bhaal flag) on all creatures, forcing Insane-level difficulty. Very heavy patch — may significantly increase install time.
WARNING: Patches EVERY .are file in override via COPY_EXISTING_REGEXP GLOB. Clears save permission flags, restricting saving to autosaves only. Ironman-lite experience. Very heavy patch.

advisories.reason: Both add creatures/scripts to BG1 area files. SCS Random Encounters may conflict with Rough World's scaled spawning.
